info.title: pgutil
info.description: Perform operations against a ProGet server.

commands.name: sources
commands.description: Manages the list of sources located in the configuration file located at /tmp/inspectra-help-pgutil-2.2.6-6475f05358f94795943011eb41d60e65/xdg-config/pgutil/pgutil.config

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds a source to the configuration file

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the source. Must be unique.

options.name: --url
options.description: ProGet source URL

options.name: --api-key
options.description: ProGet API key used to authorize access

options.name: --feed
options.description: Default feed for feed-specific operations

options.name: --password
options.description: ProGet password to use for authentication

options.name: --plain-text
options.description: Store password or API key as plain text instead of obfuscated

options.name: --username
options.description: ProGet user name to use for authentication

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists sources stored in the configuration file

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Removes a source from the configuration file

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: test
commands.description: Tests the connection to a source

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the source.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: create
commands.description: Creates an API key in ProGet

commands.name: system
commands.description: Creates a system API key. The key is the only thing written to stdout on success

options.name: --apis
options.description: Specifies the individual APIs to give access to when creating a system API key. Value is either full-control or a comma-separated list of any combination of: feeds, sca, sbom-upload

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of the API key

options.name: --expiration
options.description: Expiration date of the API key

options.name: --key
options.description: API key to create. This will be generated by ProGet when not specified. Note that ProGet security policies may disallow use of this option.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Friendly display name of the API key
Common Options (apikeys):

options.name: --api-key
options.description: ProGet API key used to authorize access

options.name: --password
options.description: ProGet user password used to authorize access

options.name: --source
options.description: Named source or URL of ProGet

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout period for requests to ProGet in seconds

options.name: --username
options.description: ProGet user name used to authorize access

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: feed
commands.description: Creates a feed API key. The key is the only thing written to stdout on success

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of the API key

options.name: --expiration
options.description: Expiration date of the API key

options.name: --feed
options.description: Name of the feeds to associate with the key. Value is a comma-separated list of feed names or "*" for all feeds.

options.name: --group
options.description: Name of the feed groups to associate with the key. Value is a comma-separated list of feed group names.

options.name: --key
options.description: API key to create. This will be generated by ProGet when not specified. Note that ProGet security policies may disallow use of this option.

options.name: --name
options.description: Friendly display name of the API key

options.name: --permissions
options.description:
Specifies the package permissions to give access to when creating a feed API key. Value is a comma-separated list of any combination of: {view, add, promote, delete}
Common Options (apikeys):

options.name: --api-key
options.description: ProGet API key used to authorize access

options.name: --password
options.description: ProGet user password used to authorize access

options.name: --source
options.description: Named source or URL of ProGet

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout period for requests to ProGet in seconds

options.name: --username
options.description: ProGet user name used to authorize access

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: packages
commands.description: Works with packages on a ProGet server

commands.name: list
commands.description: Displays latest versions of packages in a feed

options.name: --package
options.description: Name (and group where applicable) of package

options.name: --stable
options.description:
List only latest stable versions (do not include prerelease versions)

commands.description: Downloads a package file from ProGet

options.name: --version
options.description: Version of package

options.name: --output-file
options.description: Name of the file to save local package as. The server-provided value is used if this is not specified.

options.name: --stdout
options.description:
Write the package to stdout instead of a file

commands.name: upload
commands.description: Uploads a package file to ProGet.

options.name: --artifactPath
options.description: Artifact path in the feed; only applies to Maven artifacts (required)

options.name: --component
options.description: Component of the package. Only applies to Debian packages (default is main)

options.name: --distribution
options.description: Distribution of the package. Only applies to Debian packages

options.name: --input-file
options.description: Name of the file to upload. Wildcards are allowed.

options.name: --stdin
options.description:
Read the package from stdin instead of a file.

options.description: Package used in builds must not have been used within this many days to qualify for deletion

options.description:
Keeps packages that are actively consumed

options.description: Comma separated list of packages exempt from deletion

options.description: Keep packages with usage data removed only after this many days

options.name: --keepVersions
options.description: Comma separated list of versions exempt from deletion

options.description: Always keep this number of the most recent package versions

options.description:

options.description: Minimum size (in kb) of feed required to trigger retention run

Trigger download count

commands.description: Displays the settings displayed generally shown under Admin > Advanced Settings in ProGet

options.name: --expanded
options.description:
Include detail and type information about settings
Common Options (settings):

options.name: --api-key
options.description: ProGet API key used to authorize access

options.name: --password
options.description: ProGet user password used to authorize access

options.name: --source
options.description: Named source or URL of ProGet

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout period for requests to ProGet in seconds

options.name: --username
options.description: ProGet user name used to authorize access

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets the value of setting in ProGet

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the setting value to change

options.name: --value
options.description:
New value of the setting

commands.name: security
commands.description: Manages security permissions, users, and groups on ProGet

options.name: --task
options.description: Name of security task

options.name: --deny
options.description: Creates this as a deny permission instead of a grant

options.name: --feed-group
options.description: Feed group to scope permission to

options.name: --feed
options.description: Feed to scope permission to

options.name: --group
options.description: User group name to scope permission to

options.name: --user
options.description:
